description: Letter of condolence/grief upon the death of the Gaʾon Sar Shalom ha-Levi. Dating: ca. 1195 CE (the precise date of death is not known). In Judaeo-Arabic. Full of expressions of agony and praises for Sar Shalom's greatness. Same handwriting as T-S Ar.36.77. ASE
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
